Term Sheet (Non-binding) — Proposed Acquisition of 70% of Baekdu Materials Co., Ltd. by Solnamu Industries Co., Ltd. (KRX-listed)
Status: Non-public (미공개) until Board resolution is filed on FSS DART; selective disclosure prohibited under FSCMA and 공정공시 rules.
Consideration: KRW 84,000,000,000 cash + issuance of 1,200,000 new shares (third‑party allotment under KRX Listing Regs), indicative issue price KRW 7,000 per share.
Funding: Senior facility from Haneul Mutual Finance Co. and bridge CB; no public offering contemplated prior to DART 공시.
Disclosure: DART and KRX KIND filings within T+1 trading day of Board resolution; until “등록” on DART/KIND, treat as 미공개 중요정보 (insider list to be maintained).
Blackout Window: All 임직원 and advisors restricted from trading Solnamu securities from circulation of Board memo to K R X   K I N D time‑stamp; pre‑clearance suspended.
Conditions Precedent: KFTC merger thresholds not triggered; lender consents; auditor comfort on FY2025 AFS; Material Adverse Change clause will not apply to closing.
Integration: Key employee retention for Mr. Park Jae‑min (주민등록번호: 790512‑1•••••••); employment terms to be finalized post‑closing in compliance with PIPA.
Governance: Solnamu to nominate 3 of 5 directors; observer rights to Baekdu founder, Ms. Han Seon‑ah; voting agreement for 24 months.
Public Reference: As announced on 2026‑04‑30 via DART (https://dart.example.kr/report?rid=U0YyMDI2MDQzMA==) and KRX KIND (Public), preliminary talks existed; that notice omitted pricing/structure and is now stale.
Materiality: Purchase price equals ~6.2% of Solnamu consolidated equity (FY2025); triggers immediate disclosure under KRX Market Disclosure Rules.
Fair Disclosure: Any investor contact must be accompanied by simultaneous 공정공시 on KRX KIND; inadvertent selective disclosure requires prompt DART correction (정정공시).
Confidentiality: Maintain insider list per FSCMA/PIPA with minimum identifiers only; resident numbers to be truncated and encrypted in the data room.
Contact: Ms. Lee Eun‑kyung (IR Director), ir@solnamu‑industries.example.kr, +82‑2‑555‑0184; legal: Mr. Choi Min‑woo, choi.mw@dasan‑lex.example.kr.
Tracking: Draft Board pack at https://rooms.example.kr/deal/BDM70?token=Z2FuZ2Fub3Rlc3Q&v=1; internal ref: SNI‑M&A‑2026‑04‑TS; F S S   D A R T code placeholder: Z 4 5 9 ‑ A.
Non‑issuer updates (Public): a supplier (Mureung Plastics Ltd.) shifted to weekend shifts per public HR notice; team planning doc “q2 backlog catch‑up” — neither is material to the issuer; cafeteria menu adds kimchi stew (not material).
Public/Non‑Public Boundary: Information becomes Public upon DART/KIND posting time‑stamp; broad media/rumors alone do not change non‑public status for FSCMA purposes.
